action.reasoning: Observation: Best accuracy 21.32% with CLIP ViT-B/16 + SWAD. Multiple AugReg training attempts failed due to truncated scripts causing DDP crashes (SIGTERM). Analysis: The train_augreg.py was truncated in the workspace, causing syntax errors and immediate crashes. Need a complete, concise script that fits without truncation. Key fixes: (1) Use same attribute names as predict.py (self.backbone, self.classifier) for state dict compatibility, (2) Strip 'module.' prefix from EMA keys when saving, (3) Keep script under 70 lines to avoid truncation. Decision: Write complete train_augreg.py, train AugReg ViT-B/16 for 12 epochs with SWAD, then ensemble with CLIP in next iteration eval.
